title: Monitor Active Subagent Execution

findings.description: No subagent monitoring UI is visible in the chat interface. The Agent Profiles page allows configuring sub-agents JSON (name, model, tools) but there is no runtime monitoring panel for active subagent execution.
findings.expected: A panel or indicator showing active subagent execution status, progress, and results.
findings.actual: Agent Profiles page has Sub-agents JSON config field but no runtime monitoring UI exists. Would need active conversation to fully test.
findings.blocked_by: Known issue: clicking existing conversations crashes the app

verdict: Feature not implemented for runtime monitoring. Sub-agent configuration exists in Agent Profiles but no execution monitoring UI.
